functions.name: atof_float
functions.description: Parse a numeric string into a float (libc-style atof, no errno reporting).

functions.name: isalnum
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is alphanumeric (libc ctype).

functions.name: isalpha
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is alphabetic (libc ctype).

functions.name: isascii
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a 7-bit ASCII character.

functions.name: isblank
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a blank character (space or tab).

functions.name: iscntrl
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a control character.

functions.name: isdigit
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a decimal digit.

functions.name: isgraph
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a printable non-space character.

functions.name: islower
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a lower-case letter.

functions.name: isprint
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is printable, including space.

functions.name: ispunct
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a punctuation character.

functions.name: isspace
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is whitespace.

functions.name: isupper
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is an upper-case letter.

functions.name: isxdigit
functions.description: Return non-zero if `c` is a hexadecimal digit.

functions.name: tolower
functions.description: Convert `c` to lower-case if it's an upper-case letter; otherwise return unchanged.

functions.name: toupper
functions.description: Convert `c` to upper-case if it's a lower-case letter; otherwise return unchanged.

functions.name: spi_flashio
functions.signature: void spi_flashio(volatile uint8_t *pdata, int length, int wren) ATTRIB_RUNTIMECODE_FLASHIO
functions.description: Low-level SPI flash transfer — exchanges `length` bytes through `pdata`; `wren` selects write-enable.

functions.name: spi_flashio_wrapper
functions.signature: void spi_flashio_wrapper(volatile uint8_t *pdata, int length, int wren) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Build-switched wrapper around `spi_flashio` so call sites don't need to know which transfer implementation is active.

functions.name: init_flash
functions.description: Initialise the on-board SPI flash interface and read its identification data.

functions.name: read_board_id
functions.description: Read the unique board identifier from flash into `*board_id`.

functions.name: read_flash_page_byte
functions.signature: uint8_t read_flash_page_byte(uint16_t page_addr, volatile uint8_t *page_byte) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Read a single byte at `page_addr` from the flash into `*page_byte`.

functions.name: read_flash_page
functions.signature: uint8_t read_flash_page(uint16_t page_addr, volatile uint8_t *page_data) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Read a full flash page at `page_addr` into the caller-supplied `page_data` buffer.

functions.name: write_flash_page
functions.signature: uint8_t write_flash_page(uint16_t page_addr, volatile uint8_t *page_data) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Write a full flash page at `page_addr` from `page_data` (caller is responsible for prior erase if required).

functions.name: write_io_type_to_flash
functions.signature: uint8_t write_io_type_to_flash(uint8_t io_index, uint8_t io_config) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Persist the I/O-type setting for `io_index` (`io_config`) to non-volatile flash.

functions.name: read_io_type_from_flash
functions.description: Return the persisted I/O type stored in flash for `io_index`.

functions.name: write_adc_enabled_state_to_flash
functions.signature: uint8_t write_adc_enabled_state_to_flash(uint8_t adc_index, uint8_t adc_enabled) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH

functions.name: write_dac_enabled_state_to_flash
functions.signature: uint8_t write_dac_enabled_state_to_flash(uint8_t dac_index, uint8_t dac_enabled) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH

functions.name: reset_program_name_start_on_boot
functions.description: Clear the start-on-boot program slot so no program runs automatically at reset.

functions.name: set_program_name_start_on_boot
functions.description: Mark `prog_name` as the program to launch automatically on next boot.

functions.name: get_program_name_start_on_boot
functions.description: Return a pointer to the configured start-on-boot program name (NULL/empty if none).

functions.name: is_program_start_on_boot_valid
functions.description: Return true if a valid start-on-boot program is currently configured.

functions.name: clear_storage_metadata_slot_for_addr
functions.description: Free the storage-metadata slot at `prog_addr`, marking it available for reuse.

functions.name: set_storage_metadata_slot_for_addr
functions.description: Mark the storage-metadata slot at `prog_addr` as occupied.

functions.name: set_prompt_formats_start_on_boot
functions.description: Persist the time and CPU prompt formats to use at boot.

functions.name: get_time_prompt_format_start_on_boot
functions.description: Return the persisted boot-time time-prompt format.

functions.name: get_cpu_prompt_format_start_on_boot
functions.description: Return the persisted boot-time CPU-prompt format.

functions.name: make_new_program_entry
functions.description: Allocate a fresh storage slot for `prog_name` and return its starting flash address via `*prog_addr`.

functions.name: get_start_addr_of_program
functions.description: Look up the flash starting address for an existing program named `prog_name`.

functions.name: read_program_pages
functions.signature: uint16_t read_program_pages(uint8_t num_pages, uint16_t page_start_addr, volatile uint8_t *buffer, volatile uint8_t *last_page) ATTRIB_F1CODE_BUILDSWITCH
functions.description: Read up to `num_pages` flash pages starting at `page_start_addr` into `buffer`; sets `*last_page` when EOF reached.

functions.name: upload_program
functions.description: Receive a Lua program over the serial link and write it into flash under `prog_name`.

functions.name: delete_program
functions.description: Remove `prog_name` from flash, freeing its storage slots.

functions.name: delete_all_programs
functions.description: Erase every stored program from flash; `print_lvl` controls progress output verbosity.

functions.name: print_all_program_names
functions.description: Print the list of stored program names to the active output stream.

functions.name: print_all_program_addrs
functions.description: Print every stored program along with its flash address.

functions.name: print_num_saved_programs
functions.description: Print the count of programs currently stored in flash.

functions.name: print_program_data_slot_utilisation
functions.description: Print a table showing how many flash data slots are in use vs. available.

functions.name: get_cpu_addr_access_low_water_mark
functions.description: Return the lowest CPU memory address recently accessed (used for memory-usage tracing).

functions.name: get_cpu_addr_access_high_water_mark
functions.description: Return the highest CPU memory address recently accessed.

functions.name: print_cpu_access_trace
functions.description: Print the captured CPU memory-access trace to the output stream.

functions.name: init_globals
functions.description: Initialise core global state — IDs, timers, I/O config — at boot.

functions.name: read_cpu_freq
functions.description: Read and cache the CPU clock frequency from the FPGA fabric.

functions.name: read_core_info
functions.description: Read and cache per-core identification data.

functions.name: get_num_cores
functions.description: Return the total number of CPU cores configured in the build.

functions.name: get_core_id
functions.description: Return the ID of the currently executing core (0-based).

functions.name: get_cpu_freq_hz
functions.description: Return the cached CPU frequency in Hz.

functions.name: get_cpu_freq_khz
functions.description: Return the cached CPU frequency in kHz.

functions.name: get_cpu_freq_mhz
functions.description: Return the cached CPU frequency in MHz.

functions.name: was_reboot_due_to_stack_overflow
functions.description: Return non-zero if the most recent reboot was triggered by a stack-overflow trap.

functions.name: read_uart_cfg
functions.description: Read and cache the user-comms UART configuration from the FPGA.

functions.name: uart_init
functions.description: Initialise the user-comms UART (baud, parity, etc.) using the cached config.

functions.name: user_comms_enable_rx_interrupt_mode
functions.description: Switch the user-comms UART receiver to interrupt-driven mode.

functions.name: user_comms_disable_rx_interrupt_mode
functions.description: Switch the user-comms UART receiver back to polling mode.

functions.name: uart_read_char
functions.description: Non-blocking poll: return the next character from the UART, or 0 if none waiting.

functions.name: uart_read_char_blocking
functions.description: Block until a character arrives on the UART and return it.

functions.name: uart_read_char_maxwait_ms
functions.description: Block for at most `ms` milliseconds waiting for a UART character; 0 on timeout.

functions.name: uart_write_char
functions.description: Send a single character `c` over the user-comms UART.

functions.name: uart_write_string
functions.description: Send the null-terminated string `p` over the user-comms UART.

functions.name: uart_write_hexidecimal
functions.description: Print `v` as a `digits`-wide hexadecimal value over the UART.

functions.name: uart_write_ptr_hexidecimal
functions.description: Print the address held by `v` as a `digits`-wide hex value.

functions.name: uart_write_uint32_t
functions.description: Print `v` as an unsigned 32-bit decimal over the UART.

functions.name: uart_write_float
functions.description: Print floating-point value `f` over the UART.

functions.name: uart_write_string_with_prompts
functions.signature: void uart_write_string_with_prompts(e_cpu_prompt_format pf_cpu, e_time_prompt_format pf_time, const char *str, uint8_t in_command_mode)
functions.description: Print `str` to the UART, prefixed by the configured CPU/time prompts; honours command-mode formatting.

functions.name: delay_milliseconds
functions.description: Busy-wait for `milliseconds` (uses the general timer; not interruptible).

functions.name: get_uart_cfg
functions.description: Return the cached user-comms UART configuration register value.

functions.name: get_xbar_lock_cfg
functions.description: Return the configured cross-bar lock-channel mask for the current core.

functions.name: get_xbar_lock_tx_fifo_depth
functions.description: Return the lock-channel TX FIFO depth between this core and `core_id`.

functions.name: get_xbar_unlock_cfg
functions.description: Return the configured cross-bar unlock-channel mask for the current core.

functions.name: get_xbar_lock_rx_fifo_depth
functions.description: Return the lock-channel RX FIFO depth between this core and `core_id`.

functions.name: get_xbar_data_tx_cfg
functions.description: Return the configured cross-bar data-TX channel mask for the current core.

functions.name: get_xbar_data_tx_fifo_depth
functions.description: Return the data-TX FIFO depth from this core to `core_id`.

functions.name: get_xbar_data_rx_cfg
functions.description: Return the configured cross-bar data-RX channel mask for the current core.

functions.name: get_xbar_data_rx_fifo_depth
functions.description: Return the data-RX FIFO depth from `core_id` to this core.

functions.name: xbar_lock
functions.description: Block until the cross-bar lock barrier with `core` is unlocked, then re-lock it.

functions.name: xbar_lock_nonblocking
functions.description: Attempt to lock the cross-bar barrier with `core`; sets `*success` to indicate result.

functions.name: xbar_unlock
functions.description: Block until the cross-bar lock barrier with `core` is locked, then unlock it.

functions.name: xbar_unlock_nonblocking
functions.description: Attempt to unlock the cross-bar barrier with `core`; sets `*success` to indicate result.

functions.name: xbar_data_tx
functions.description: Block until the cross-bar data channel to `core` is ready, then send `byte`.

functions.name: xbar_data_tx_nonblocking
functions.signature: uint8_t xbar_data_tx_nonblocking(uint8_t core, uint8_t byte, uint8_t *success)
functions.description: Attempt to send `byte` over the cross-bar data channel to `core`; sets `*success` to indicate result.

functions.name: xbar_data_rx
functions.description: Block until a byte arrives from `core` over the cross-bar; stores it in `*byte`.

functions.name: xbar_data_rx_nonblocking
functions.description: Attempt to receive a byte from `core` over the cross-bar; sets `*success` if data was available.

functions.name: init_cpu_prompt_format_for_repl
functions.description: Reset the CPU prompt format to the REPL default at session start.

functions.name: increment_cpu_prompt_format
functions.description: Cycle the CPU prompt to the next configured format.

functions.name: get_time_prompt_format
functions.description: Return the currently active time-prompt format.

functions.name: get_cpu_prompt_format
functions.description: Return the currently active CPU-prompt format.

functions.name: set_time_prompt_format
functions.description: Set the active time-prompt format to `pf`.

functions.name: set_cpu_prompt_format
functions.description: Set the active CPU-prompt format to `cpu_prompt_format`.

functions.name: increment_time_prompt_format
functions.description: Cycle the time prompt to the next configured format.

functions.name: is_valid_time_prompt_format
functions.description: Return non-zero if `pf` is one of the recognised time-prompt formats.

functions.name: time_prompt_format_to_string
functions.description: Return a human-readable name for time-prompt format `pf`.

functions.name: cpu_prompt_format_to_string
functions.description: Return a human-readable name for CPU-prompt format `pf`.

functions.name: read_performance_timer_cfg
functions.description: Read and cache the performance-timer presence/config from the FPGA.

functions.name: get_performance_timer_cfg
functions.description: Return the cached performance-timer configuration value.

functions.name: clear_system_time_caches
functions.description: Invalidate cached system-time values so the next read fetches fresh data.

functions.name: trigger_caching_of_system_time
functions.description: Capture the current system time into the named cache slot.

functions.name: read_general_timer_cfg
functions.description: Read and cache the general-timer presence/config from the FPGA.

functions.name: get_general_timer_cfg
functions.description: Return the cached general-timer configuration value.

functions.name: cancel_interruptible_sleep
functions.description: Wake any in-progress interruptible sleep on this core.

functions.name: doing_interruptible_sleep
functions.description: Return non-zero if the current core is presently inside an interruptible sleep.

functions.name: sleep_milliseconds
functions.signature: e_sleep_end_cause sleep_milliseconds(uint16_t ms, uint8_t interruptible_options) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Sleep for `ms` milliseconds; honours `interruptible_options` to allow user-interrupt cancellation.

functions.name: continue_sleep_milliseconds
functions.description: Resume an interrupted millisecond sleep with the same options.

functions.name: sleep_microseconds
functions.signature: e_sleep_end_cause sleep_microseconds(uint16_t microsec, uint8_t interruptible_options) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Sleep for `microsec` microseconds; honours `interruptible_options`.

functions.name: continue_sleep_microseconds
functions.description: Resume an interrupted microsecond sleep with the same options.

functions.name: set_board_leds_state
functions.description: Apply a vector of LED states (`led_st[]`, length `num_leds`) to the on-board LEDs.

functions.name: set_board_led_state
functions.description: Set a single on-board LED `board_led` to state `led_st`.

functions.name: get_board_led_state
functions.description: Return the current state of on-board LED `board_led`.

functions.name: toggle_board_led_state
functions.description: Invert the state of on-board LED `board_led`.

functions.name: set_all_board_leds_off
functions.description: Force every on-board LED to the off state.

functions.name: set_board_leds_hw_mode
functions.description: Hand on-board LED control back to the FPGA hardware (no longer driven by software).

functions.name: set_board_leds_sw_mode
functions.description: Take software control of the on-board LEDs (overrides hardware-driven patterns).

functions.name: set_software_interrupt_enabled_state
functions.description: Enable or disable the global software-interrupt master switch.

functions.name: software_interrupts_enabled
functions.description: Return non-zero if global software interrupts are currently enabled.

functions.name: set_repl_interrupt_mode
functions.description: Enable or disable REPL-interrupt mode for the current session.

functions.name: repl_interrupt_mode_enabled
functions.description: Return non-zero if REPL interrupts are currently active.

functions.name: remove_trailing_nl_and_cr
functions.description: Strip any trailing CR/LF characters from `str` in place.

functions.name: set_successfully_booted_hardware_flag
functions.description: Mark the boot sequence as having reached a known-good state.

functions.name: get_successfully_booted_hardware_flag
functions.description: Return non-zero if the boot sequence completed successfully.

functions.name: valid_hardware_id
functions.description: Return non-zero if the cached hardware ID matches an expected value.

functions.name: reboot_board
functions.description: Trigger a hardware reboot of the board.

functions.name: get_hardware_watchdog_timer_ms
functions.description: Return the current watchdog timer countdown value in milliseconds.

functions.name: get_hardware_watchdog_timeout_ms
functions.description: Return the configured watchdog timeout value in milliseconds.

functions.name: reset_hardware_watchdog_ms
functions.description: Pet the hardware watchdog (resets its countdown to the configured timeout).

functions.name: get_memory_trace_enabled
functions.description: Return non-zero if memory access tracing is currently enabled.

functions.name: read_fpga_io_bus_enabled
functions.description: Return non-zero if the FPGA fabric I/O bus is enabled in this build.

functions.name: get_stack_memory_total_kb
functions.description: Return the total stack memory size in kilobytes.

functions.name: get_stack_low_water_mark
functions.description: Return the lowest free-stack value observed since the last reset.

functions.name: reset_stack_low_water_mark
functions.description: Reset the stack low-water-mark tracking to current free-stack size.

functions.name: enable_stack_overflow_trace
functions.description: Enable hardware-assisted stack-overflow trace logging.

functions.name: reset_stack_overflow_occurred_flag
functions.description: Clear the latched 'stack overflow occurred' flag.

functions.name: set_out_of_heap_memory_flag
functions.description: Latch a flag indicating heap exhaustion was encountered (called by allocators).

functions.name: get_heap_memory_total_kb
functions.description: Return total configured heap size in kilobytes.

functions.name: get_heap_memory_free
functions.description: Return the current number of free bytes in the heap.

functions.name: get_heap_memory_free_low_water_mark
functions.description: Return the smallest free-heap value observed since the last reset.

functions.name: reset_heap_low_water_mark
functions.description: Reset the heap low-water-mark tracking to current free-heap size.

functions.name: fgets_with_history
functions.signature: uint8_t fgets_with_history(uint8_t in_command_mode, const char *prmt, char *buffer, size_t size, char **history_line_buffer, uint8_t history_wr_index, uint8_t max_history_lines)
functions.description: Read a line into `buffer` (max `size` bytes) with up/down arrow history support; updates the history buffer.

functions.name: get_cursor_position
functions.description: Query the terminal for cursor position via ANSI escape; returns it via `*row` and `*col`.

functions.name: get_console_rows_with_default_on_failure
functions.description: Return the terminal row count, falling back to a built-in default on query failure.

functions.name: get_console_cols_with_default_on_failure
functions.description: Return the terminal column count, falling back to a built-in default on query failure.

functions.name: clear_console_and_history_and_reset_cursor
functions.description: Clear screen + scrollback and move cursor to origin via ANSI escapes.

functions.name: move_cursor_to_top_of_screen
functions.description: Move the terminal cursor to row 1, column 1.

functions.name: move_cursor_to_bottom_of_screen
functions.description: Move the terminal cursor to the bottom row.

functions.name: print_full_page_print_footer
functions.signature: void print_full_page_print_footer(const char *page_type, const char *page_name, uint16_t total_lines, uint16_t curr_line)
functions.description: Render a paginated 'page X of Y' footer for long output listings.

functions.name: disable_user_comms_rx_esc_seq_filter
functions.description: Disable the user-comms RX escape-sequence filter (lets escape codes pass through).

functions.name: enable_user_comms_rx_esc_seq_filter
functions.description: Enable the user-comms RX escape-sequence filter (strips ANSI codes from input).

functions.name: init_io
functions.description: Initialise all I/O pin state at boot, applying any persisted configuration.

functions.name: io_get_num_pins
functions.description: Return the number of physical I/O pins this build supports.

functions.name: update_io_type
functions.description: Apply a new I/O type to `io_index` immediately (without persisting to flash).

functions.name: get_io_type_as_str
functions.description: Return the active I/O type for `io_index` as a printable string (e.g. "GPIO_OUT").

functions.name: user_io_num_from_str
functions.description: Parse a user-facing PIN string (e.g. "PIN3") into its integer pin index.

functions.name: is_hardware_shared_spi_config
functions.description: Return non-zero if the hardware uses the shared-SPI configuration variant.

functions.name: get_smallest_index_dynamic_iotype_offset
functions.description: Return the lowest enum value reserved for dynamic (shared-SPI) IO types.

functions.name: get_max_iotypes
functions.description: Return the highest valid I/O type enum value for this build.

functions.name: get_io_type
functions.description: Return the currently configured I/O type for `user_io_num`.

functions.name: valid_user_io_num
functions.description: Return non-zero if `user_io_num` is a valid pin index for this build.

functions.name: valid_user_io_num_as_str
functions.description: Return non-zero if `user_io_num_str` parses as a valid pin ("PIN<n>").

functions.name: valid_formatting_for_user_io_num_as_str
functions.description: Return non-zero if `user_io_num_str` matches the expected PIN<n> format (regardless of range).

functions.name: valid_io_type_as_str
functions.description: Return non-zero if `io_type_str` names a recognised I/O type.

functions.name: valid_standalone_io_type
functions.description: Return non-zero if `io_type` is a standalone (non-shared-SPI) IO type.

functions.name: valid_io_baud
functions.description: Return non-zero if `baud_rate` is one of the supported UART baud rates.

functions.name: can_set_baud_for_io_type
functions.description: Return non-zero if `iotype` is a UART variant that accepts a baud setting.

functions.name: is_baud_config_applicable_to_io
functions.description: Return non-zero if pin `io_index` is currently configured as UART (so baud applies).

functions.name: get_baud_config_for_io
functions.description: Return the active UART baud rate for pin `io_index`.

functions.name: set_baud_config_for_io
functions.signature: uint8_t set_baud_config_for_io(uint32_t io_index, uint32_t baud) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Set the UART baud rate of pin `io_index` to `baud`.

functions.name: valid_io_pwm_freq
functions.description: Return non-zero if `pwm_freq_khz` is within the supported PWM frequency range.

functions.name: get_pwm_clock_divider
functions.description: Return the FPGA clock divider corresponding to `pwm_freq_khz`.

functions.name: is_pwm_config_applicable_to_io
functions.description: Return non-zero if pin `io_index` is currently configured as PWM.

functions.name: get_pwm_config_for_io
functions.description: Return the active PWM frequency setting (kHz) for pin `io_index`.

functions.name: set_pwm_config_for_io
functions.signature: uint8_t set_pwm_config_for_io(uint32_t io_index, uint8_t pwm_freq_khz) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Set the PWM frequency for pin `io_index` to `pwm_freq_khz`.

functions.name: get_spi_freq_from_clock_divider
functions.description: Convert an FPGA clock divider value back to its equivalent SPI frequency (kHz).

functions.name: get_spi_clock_divider
functions.description: Return the FPGA clock divider corresponding to `spi_freq_khz`.

functions.name: is_spi_config_applicable_to_io
functions.description: Return non-zero if pin `io_index` is currently configured for SPI.

functions.name: get_spi_config_for_io
functions.description: Return the active SPI frequency setting (kHz) for pin `io_index`.

functions.name: set_spi_config_for_standalone_spi_io
functions.description: Set SPI frequency for an independently-clocked SPI pin.

functions.name: set_spi_config_for_io
functions.signature: uint8_t set_spi_config_for_io(uint32_t io_index, uint8_t spi_freq_khz) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Set the SPI frequency for pin `io_index` to `spi_freq_khz`.

functions.name: valid_io_spi_freq
functions.description: Return non-zero if `spi_freq_khz` is within the supported SPI frequency range.

functions.name: configure_spi_out_for_shared_spi_config_hardware
functions.description: Apply shared-SPI hardware configuration for an output-direction pin.

functions.name: configure_spi_in_for_shared_spi_config_hardware
functions.description: Apply shared-SPI hardware configuration for an input-direction pin.

functions.name: get_software_interrupt_types_for_io
functions.description: Return the bitmask of currently-enabled software interrupt types on pin `io_index`.

functions.name: set_software_interrupt_types_for_io
functions.description: Replace the enabled software-interrupt-type bitmask on pin `io_index`.

functions.name: enable_software_interrupt_types_for_io
functions.description: OR `interrupt_mask` into the enabled software-interrupt-type set on pin `io_index`.

functions.name: disable_software_interrupt_types_for_io
functions.description: Clear the bits in `interrupt_mask` from the enabled set on pin `io_index`.

functions.name: get_software_interrupt_vector
functions.description: Return the global vector of pending software interrupts (one bit per pin).

functions.name: get_software_interrupts_for_io
functions.description: Return the bitmask of currently-pending interrupts on pin `io_index`.

functions.name: acknowledge_software_interrupts_for_io
functions.description: Acknowledge (clear) the bits in `interrupts` for pin `io_index`.

functions.name: set_io_type
functions.signature: e_status set_io_type(uint16_t io_index, e_iotype io_type) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Set the I/O type for pin `io_index` to `io_type`.

functions.name: set_io_type_from_str
functions.description: Set the I/O type for pin `io_index` from a string name (e.g. "GPIO_OUT").

functions.name: set_gpio
functions.signature: e_status set_gpio(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t gpio_val) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Drive the GPIO output of `user_io_num` to `gpio_val` (LOW/HIGH/TOGGLE).

functions.name: get_gpio
functions.description: Read the current GPIO input level on `user_io_num` into `*gpio_val`.

functions.name: set_pwm
functions.signature: e_status set_pwm(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t pwm_val) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Set the PWM duty cycle of `user_io_num` to `pwm_val` (0..PWM_VALUE_MAX).

functions.name: spi_tx_char
functions.signature: e_status spi_tx_char(uint32_t user_io_num, char tx_char) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit one byte (`tx_char`) over the SPI master on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: spi_tx_byte
functions.signature: e_status spi_tx_byte(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t tx_byte) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit one byte (`tx_byte`) over the SPI master on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: spi_tx_int
functions.signature: e_status spi_tx_int(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t tx_word) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit a 32-bit word (`tx_word`) over the SPI master on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: spi_rx_byte
functions.signature: e_status spi_rx_byte(uint32_t user_io_num, volatile uint8_t *rx_byte) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Receive a single byte from the SPI slave on `user_io_num` into `*rx_byte`.

functions.name: uart_tx_char
functions.signature: e_status uart_tx_char(uint32_t user_io_num, char tx_char) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit one byte (`tx_char`) over the UART on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: uart_tx_byte
functions.signature: e_status uart_tx_byte(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t tx_byte) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit one byte (`tx_byte`) over the UART on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: uart_tx_int
functions.signature: e_status uart_tx_int(uint32_t user_io_num, uint32_t tx_word) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Transmit a 32-bit word (`tx_word`) over the UART on `user_io_num`.

functions.name: uart_rx_byte
functions.signature: e_status uart_rx_byte(uint32_t user_io_num, volatile uint8_t *uart_rx_val) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Block-receive one byte from the UART on `user_io_num` into `*uart_rx_val`.

functions.name: uart_rx_byte_nonblocking
functions.signature: e_status uart_rx_byte_nonblocking(uint32_t user_io_num, volatile uint8_t *uart_rx_val, uint8_t *uart_rx_val_valid) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Non-blocking receive: returns the next UART byte if available, with `*uart_rx_val_valid` set accordingly.

functions.name: standalone_io_type_tostring
functions.description: Return the string name for a standalone I/O type enum value.

functions.name: relational_io_type_tostring
functions.description: Return the string name for a relational (paired) I/O type enum value.

functions.name: analog_io_type_tostring
functions.description: Return the string name for an analog I/O type enum value.

functions.name: reset_io_type_config
functions.description: Reset pin `io_index` to type NONE (releases any active configuration).

functions.name: reset_all_io_config
functions.description: Reset every pin to type NONE.

functions.name: print_io_type_config
functions.description: Print the I/O type configuration of every pin.

functions.name: print_io_baud_config
functions.description: Print the UART baud configuration for every UART-configured pin.

functions.name: print_io_pwm_config
functions.description: Print the PWM frequency for every PWM-configured pin.

functions.name: print_io_spi_config
functions.description: Print the SPI frequency for every SPI-configured pin.

functions.name: print_io_capabilities
functions.description: Print the per-pin capability matrix (which I/O types each pin supports).

functions.name: save_io_config_as_start_on_boot
functions.description: Persist the active I/O configuration to flash for use on next boot.

functions.name: load_start_on_boot_config_for_all_io
functions.description: Apply the persisted boot-time I/O configuration to every pin.

functions.name: get_default_spi_clock_divider
functions.description: Return the FPGA clock divider used at the default SPI frequency.

functions.name: initialise_memory
functions.description: Initialise the heap allocator and memory metadata at boot.

functions.name: get_memory_total_bytes
functions.description: Return the total heap size in bytes.

functions.name: get_memory_free_bytes
functions.description: Return the current free heap in bytes.

functions.name: free
functions.description: Standard free() — release the allocation pointed to by `ptr`.

functions.name: memcmp
functions.signature: int memcmp(const void *s1, const void *s2, size_t n) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Standard memcmp() — compare `n` bytes between `s1` and `s2`.

functions.name: get_memory_usage_trace_enabled
functions.description: Return non-zero if memory-usage tracing is currently enabled.

functions.name: enable_memory_usage_trace
functions.description: Begin recording per-allocation memory usage for diagnostics.

functions.name: disable_memory_usage_trace
functions.description: Stop recording memory usage.

functions.name: reset_memory_free_bytes_min_observed
functions.description: Reset the lowest-observed free-bytes counter to the current value.

functions.name: get_memory_free_bytes_min_observed
functions.description: Return the smallest free-heap size observed since boot/reset.

functions.name: allow_only_fast_heap_large_regions
functions.description: Restrict the fast-heap allocator to large regions only.

functions.name: allow_all_fast_heap_regions
functions.description: Allow the fast-heap allocator to use any region size.

functions.name: report_memory_layout
functions.description: Print a summary of the heap region layout to the output stream.

functions.name: set_memory_alloc_size_occurances_track_accumulated
functions.description: Switch the alloc-size occurrence counter to accumulating mode (counts persist).

functions.name: set_memory_alloc_size_occurances_track_nonaccumulated
functions.description: Switch the alloc-size occurrence counter to non-accumulating mode.

functions.name: print_memory_alloc_size_occurances
functions.description: Print the table of allocation-size occurrence counts.

functions.name: reset_memory_alloc_size_occurances
functions.description: Clear the allocation-size occurrence counters.

functions.name: print_fast_memory_state
functions.description: Print the current state of the fast-heap allocator (region usage).

functions.name: print_fast_memory_alloc_size_occurances
functions.description: Print the fast-heap allocation-size occurrence counts.

functions.name: reset_fast_memory_alloc_size_occurances
functions.description: Clear the fast-heap allocation-size occurrence counters.

functions.name: sprintf_
functions.signature: int sprintf_(char* buffer, const char* format, ...) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Compact-printf sprintf — format into `buffer` (no overflow check).

functions.name: snprintf_
functions.signature: int snprintf_(char* buffer, size_t count, const char* format, ...) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Compact-printf snprintf — format into `buffer` with at most `count` bytes written.

functions.name: vsnprintf_
functions.signature: int vsnprintf_(char* buffer, size_t count, const char* format, va_list va) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Compact-printf vsnprintf — variadic-list version of snprintf.

functions.name: init_mem_buf
functions.description: Initialise the standard-library file-buffering memory pool.

functions.name: abs
functions.description: Return the absolute value of `j`.

functions.name: abort
functions.description: Abnormal termination — does not return.

functions.name: system
functions.description: Pass `command` to the host shell. Stub on this platform; returns -1 if unsupported.

functions.name: printf
functions.description: Standard printf — write a formatted string to stdout.

functions.name: fclose
functions.description: Close the file `stream` and release its buffers.

functions.name: fflush
functions.description: Flush any buffered output for `stream`.

functions.name: fread
functions.signature: size_t fread(void *ptr, size_t size, size_t nmemb, FILE *stream) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Read `nmemb` items of `size` bytes from `stream` into `ptr`.

functions.name: fwrite
functions.signature: size_t fwrite(const void *ptr, size_t size, size_t nmemb, FILE *stream) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Write `nmemb` items of `size` bytes from `ptr` to `stream`.

functions.name: fwrite_hex_linewidth8bytes
functions.signature: size_t fwrite_hex_linewidth8bytes(const void *ptr, size_t size, size_t nmemb, FILE *stream) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Write `ptr` to `stream` as a hex dump, eight bytes per line.

functions.name: fgetc
functions.description: Read the next character from `stream` (EOF on end-of-file).

functions.name: fseek
functions.signature: int fseek(FILE *stream, long offset, int whence) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Reposition the file pointer of `stream` to `offset` bytes from `whence`.

functions.name: ftell
functions.description: Return the current byte offset of `stream` from its start.

functions.name: getc
functions.description: Read the next character from `stream` (typically a macro alias for fgetc).

functions.name: getchar
functions.description: Read the next character from stdin.

functions.name: putchar
functions.description: Write character `c` to stdout.

functions.name: puts
functions.description: Write `s` followed by a newline to stdout.

functions.name: ungetc
functions.description: Push character `c` back onto `stream` so the next read returns it.

functions.name: strcmp
functions.signature: int strcmp(const char *s1, const char *s2) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Lexicographic compare of null-terminated strings `s1` and `s2`.

functions.name: strcmp_volatile
functions.signature: int strcmp_volatile(volatile const char *s1, volatile const char *s2) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Volatile-pointer variant of strcmp; safe against concurrently-modified buffers.

functions.name: strlen
functions.description: Return the length (in bytes) of the null-terminated string `s`.

functions.name: strlen_volatile
functions.description: Volatile-pointer variant of strlen.

functions.name: strcoll
functions.signature: int strcoll(const char *s1, const char *s2) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Locale-aware compare of `s1` and `s2`. On this platform behaves identically to strcmp.

functions.name: strspn
functions.signature: size_t strspn(const char *s, const char *accept) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Return the length of the prefix of `s` made up of characters in `accept`.

functions.name: strncmp
functions.signature: int strncmp(const char *s1, const char *s2, size_t n) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Compare up to `n` bytes of `s1` and `s2` lexicographically.

functions.name: setvbuf
functions.signature: int setvbuf(FILE *stream, char *buf, int mode, size_t size) ATTRIB_F1CODE
functions.description: Configure buffering for `stream` (mode = _IOFBF / _IOLBF / _IONBF).

functions.name: my_clock
functions.description: Return a free-running clock-tick count (board-specific replacement for clock()).

functions.name: my_time
functions.description: Read the current system time into the caller-supplied buffer (board-specific replacement for time()).

functions.name: strtod_f
functions.description: Parse a float from `nptr`; if `endptr` is non-NULL, sets it to the first unparsed character.

functions.name: strtol
functions.signature: long strtol(const char *nptr, char **endptr, int base) ATTRIB_F3CODE
functions.description: Parse a signed long from `nptr` in the given `base` (or auto-detect when base is 0).
